metadata.description: Fraud detection rules and thresholds for ML+Rule-based system

tier1_extreme_signals.description: TIER 1 - Absolute Certainty: 2+ extreme signals OR 1 extreme + high ML

tier2_strong_evidence.description: TIER 2 - Strong Evidence: Score-based detection (75+ points)

tier3_ml_based.description: TIER 3 - ML-Based Detection: High ML confidence with supporting evidence

EXTREME_BURST.name: Extreme Transaction Burst
EXTREME_BURST.description: 4+ transactions within 5 minutes - typical card testing or fraud spree
EXTREME_BURST.risk: This pattern is highly indicative of automated fraud tools or stolen card testing

MAJOR_BURST.name: Major Transaction Burst
MAJOR_BURST.description: 5+ transactions within 10 minutes - indicates automated fraud or stolen card
MAJOR_BURST.risk: Rapid succession suggests unauthorized access with intent to maximize damage before detection

BURST.name: Transaction Burst
BURST.description: 3+ transactions within 5 minutes - abnormal spending velocity
BURST.risk: Human shoppers rarely complete multiple purchases this quickly

FastBurst.name: Fast Burst Pattern
FastBurst.description: 4+ transactions within 10 minutes - rapid succession pattern
FastBurst.risk: Suggests coordinated fraud attack or card testing operation

Rapid.name: Rapid Transactions
Rapid.description: 5+ transactions within 15 minutes - elevated transaction frequency
Rapid.risk: Above normal velocity indicating possible unauthorized use

MASSIVE_AMT.name: Massive Amount Spike
MASSIVE_AMT.description: Transaction 4.5+ standard deviations above customer average
MASSIVE_AMT.risk: Extreme deviation suggests fraudster attempting to maximize stolen card value

HUGE_AMT.name: Huge Amount Anomaly
HUGE_AMT.description: Transaction 3.8+ standard deviations above norm, over $500
HUGE_AMT.risk: Significantly higher than customer norm, likely unauthorized large purchase

VeryHighAmt.name: Very High Amount
VeryHighAmt.description: Transaction 3.5+ standard deviations above customer average
VeryHighAmt.risk: Purchase amount drastically outside normal spending pattern

HighAmt.name: High Amount
HighAmt.description: Transaction 3+ standard deviations above customer average
HighAmt.risk: Unusually large transaction for this customer

EXTREME_DIST.name: Extreme Distance
EXTREME_DIST.description: Transaction 4+ standard deviations from home location
EXTREME_DIST.risk: Geographically impossible or highly unlikely location for this customer

VERY_FAR.name: Very Far Location
VERY_FAR.description: Transaction 3.5+ standard deviations from typical locations, over 100km
VERY_FAR.risk: Purchase location far outside customer normal geographic range

VeryFar.name: Very Far Distance
VeryFar.description: Transaction 3.5+ standard deviations from customer home
VeryFar.risk: Location significantly distant from customer home base

FRAUD_MERCHANT.name: High-Fraud Merchant
FRAUD_MERCHANT.description: Merchant has 40%+ fraud rate across 50+ transactions
FRAUD_MERCHANT.risk: This merchant is a known fraud hotspot with very high historical fraud rate

RiskyMerch.name: Risky Merchant Category
RiskyMerch.description: Merchant has 30%+ fraud rate across 40+ transactions
RiskyMerch.risk: Merchant associated with above-average fraudulent transactions

FRAUD_HISTORY.name: Multiple Fraud History
FRAUD_HISTORY.description: Customer has 3+ confirmed previous fraud incidents
FRAUD_HISTORY.risk: Account has been compromised multiple times - may indicate repeat targeting or vulnerability

PrevFraud.name: Previous Fraud
PrevFraud.description: Customer has 2+ confirmed fraud incidents in history
PrevFraud.risk: Account has been compromised before, making it higher risk for repeat fraud

LateOnline.name: Late Night Online Purchase
LateOnline.description: Online purchase between 1-5 AM with amount over $400
LateOnline.risk: Late-night online purchases are common in card-not-present fraud

ML.name: Machine Learning Detection
ML.risk: Advanced algorithms identified suspicious patterns not obvious to rule-based systems

1.name: TIER 1 - ABSOLUTE CERTAINTY
1.description: 2+ extreme signals OR 1 extreme signal + high ML confidence (80+%)
1.action: IMMEDIATE INVESTIGATION REQUIRED - Block card and contact customer

2.name: TIER 2 - STRONG EVIDENCE
2.description: Score-based detection: 75+ risk points from multiple fraud indicators
2.action: HIGH PRIORITY - Contact customer within 24 hours for verification

3.name: TIER 3 - ML-BASED DETECTION
3.description: High ML confidence (82%+) with 2+ supporting behavioral anomalies
3.action: INVESTIGATION RECOMMENDED - Review and verify transaction

immediate_actions: Attempt customer contact via all verified phone numbers and email addresses
Place temporary authorization hold on card if transaction not yet settled
Review account for additional suspicious transactions in past 72 hours
Flag account for enhanced monitoring and velocity controls
Document all attempted customer contact and system actions taken
short_term_actions: Conduct comprehensive transaction history analysis for behavioral patterns
Verify merchant legitimacy and check merchant fraud risk profile
If customer confirms fraud, initiate Regulation E claim process immediately
Complete all regulatory compliance documentation requirements
Escalate to specialized fraud investigation unit if pattern suggests organized crime
verification_questions: Did you authorize this transaction at {merchant} for ${amt}?
Have you recently traveled to or been in the vicinity of {location}?
Do you currently have physical possession of your payment card?
Have you shared your card number, CVV, or PIN with anyone recently?
Have you noticed any other unauthorized transactions on your account?
Have you received any suspicious calls, emails, or texts requesting card information?
